loop_gap_note: RUN 87: ~1h gap from Run86. 1 new fix applied: META_LEARNING_CONFLICT_DETECTION (conf=88%). BTC_LONG_VETO tracking added (conf=72%, below 75% threshold).

new_fixes_this_run.description: Add conflict detection to meta_learning insight insertion. Insights 3/7/9 contradict on leverage/WR.
new_fixes_this_run.action: bot/llm/meta_learning.py: on insight insert, scan for same (category, metric). Invalidate lower-confidence duplicates.
new_fixes_this_run.expected_impact: Data integrity fix. Prevents contradictory leverage/WR beliefs corrupting meta-confidence.

tracking_only_this_run.reason: 72% < 75% auto-apply threshold. Existing coverage: BTC_LONG_reduce (50%), CRITIC_PROMPT_BTC_LONG_BIAS (100%). Will upgrade if next audit reaches 75%+.

block_log.finding: TP1 is a PARTIAL close (position_manager.py:73 tp1_close_pct=0.5). Adding TP1 to _FULL_CLOSE would cause feedback systems to record a full-close outcome while 50% of the position is still in trailing mode. Corrupts all 7 feedback learning loops.
block_log.correct_fix: Accumulate partial_close_pnl in position object at TP1 hit. When trailing stop fires, pass total_pnl = partial_close_pnl + trailing_pnl to record_outcome().

pending_code_implementations.description: New fix Run87: Add deduplication logic to meta_learning insight insertion. When adding new insight, check existing ACTIVE insights for same (category, metric). Invalidate lower-confidence duplicate. Add conflict_with field.
pending_code_implementations.expected_impact: Prevents 3+ contradictory leverage/WR beliefs from simultaneously influencing decisions.

pending_code_implementations.description: Store partial_close_pnl on position object at TP1 hit. Pass cumulative total to all 7 record_outcome() calls at trailing close. Fixes $61/trade feedback underestimation on 111 trailing exits/100d.
Lock 70% TP1 gain as trailing floor in position_manager.py:1244. env_var: TRAILING_MIN_LOCK_PCT=0.70.
pending_code_implementations.expected_impact: +$3,759 per 100d sim (Run86 framing: TP1+trailing WR=64% avg=+$10.03, lock converts trailing losses to TP2 wins)

pending_code_implementations.description: Add pytest for graduated rule condition matching.
